title: GitHub Actions release workflow (multi-OS bundle + tag)

context.goal: On git tag push (v*), build whisper.cpp sidecar + Tauri app on ubuntu-latest and windows-latest, attach all bundle artifacts to a GitHub Release. Uses tauri-apps/tauri-action.

jobs.name: release
jobs.runners: one job per OS, fail-fast false

job_steps: Rust cache (Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 with workspaces: src-tauri -> target)
Linux only: install system deps via apt (libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libgtk-3-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev libasound2-dev libpulse-dev libssl-dev xdotool)
Windows only: nothing extra (MSVC + cmake preinstalled on windows-latest runners)

tauri-apps/tauri-action@v0 with tagName, releaseName, releaseBody, releaseDraft: true, prerelease: false, args: '' (Linux) / '' (Windows). The action calls `tauri build` and uploads bundle artifacts to a Release matching the tag.

env_secrets.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
env_secrets.purpose: Provided automatically by GHA. tauri-action uses it to create/update the Release.

future_signing_placeholders: TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY (for Tauri updater signature, only if updater enabled later)
Windows code signing (sign-cli) -> deferred; document in T12 runbook as 'TODO: add WINDOWS_CERTIFICATE + WINDOWS_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD secrets and post-build signtool step'
complete_workflow_yaml:
name: release
on:
  push:
    tags: ['v*']
jobs:
  release:
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - os: ubuntu-22.04
          - os: windows-latest
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
        with:
          workspaces: src-tauri -> target
      - name: Install Linux deps
        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-22.04'
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libgtk-3-dev \
            libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev libasound2-dev \
            libpulse-dev libssl-dev xdotool
      - name: Build whisper.cpp (Linux)
        if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-22.04'
        run: bash scripts/build-whisper.sh
      - name: Build whisper.cpp (Windows)
        if: matrix.os == 'windows-latest'
        shell: pwsh
        run: ./scripts/build-whisper.ps1
      - run: npm ci
      - uses: tauri-apps/tauri-action@v0
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        with:
          tagName: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          releaseName: 'Dictate ${{ github.ref_name }}'
          releaseBody: 'See CHANGELOG. Windows: download the .exe (NSIS) installer. Linux: .deb / .AppImage / .rpm.'
          releaseDraft: true
          prerelease: false
steps: Write release.yml with the YAML above
Commit on a feature branch; push and verify workflow appears in Actions tab (it will not run yet — no tag)
Test by pushing a throwaway tag: git tag v0.0.1-test ; git push origin v0.0.1-test. Watch run. Delete draft release + tag after.
Iterate on failures (most common: missing apt dep, sidecar path mismatch, npm ci lockfile drift)
acceptance: Workflow file passes GH Actions YAML lint (Actions tab shows no syntax error)
Test tag run completes both matrix legs green
Draft release contains: 1+ Linux .deb, 1+ AppImage, 1+ Windows .exe (NSIS), 1+ .msi
Each artifact downloadable and >5MB (sanity check: not an empty stub)
